extortion.description: In summer 2025 our team managed to crack IT defenses of a large number of companies. Data of some of them hasn't been leaked, so we will just list company names. They are: Sweetener Supply, Aurora Air Products, Safti First, The Law Offices of Hicks & Demps, SPEEDLOGISTIK, TOP Ships, Geotec, Sterling Card Solutions, TRS Industries, Microcosm, GWU-Umwelttechnik GmbH.
